name: Why Jump
short_description: Why Jump? Because the only way is up. Why Jump is a vertical platformer where one wrong move can cost you — but don’t worry, there are checkpoints to catch your breath. Sometimes. Test your patience, sharpen your skills, and see how high you can climb.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Why Jump — a challenging vertical platformer where you'll climb, fall, and question your life choices.
Every jump demands focus. Every slip might set you back. But don't worry — there are checkpoints along the way to help you breathe... at least for now.

This is a game about persistence, patience, and perfectly-timed jumps.
So — will you keep going, or keep asking... Why Jump?

Features:

  • Tough vertical platforming with smartly placed checkpoints

  • Fall, learn, and try again — no permanent punishment

  • Bright visuals with dangerously deceptive level design

  • Simple, responsive controls for precise jumping

  • Built for players who love a challenge, but hate giving up
